struct FileHandle {
    path: String,
}

impl FileHandle {
    fn cleanup(self) -> std::io::Result<()> {
        std::fs::remove_file(&self.path)?;
        Ok(())
    }
}

struct DatabasePool {
    connections: Vec<Connection>,
}

impl DatabasePool {
    async fn shutdown(mut self) {
        for conn in self.connections.drain(..) {
            conn.close().await;
        }
    }
}

struct Connection;
impl Connection {
    async fn close(self) {
        // async cleanup
    }
}
